title: Degradable polymers
summary: 9701 A Level — biodegradable, photodegradable, and hydrolysable polymers.
learningObjectives: Explain hydrolysis of ester and amide links.

simpleExplanation.title: Polymers that break down
simpleExplanation.summary: Polyalkenes resist degradation. Designers add hydrolysable links or UV-sensitive groups so polymers break down after use.
steps: Ester/amide links hydrolyse in acid or alkali.
Recycling may still beat some bio-options.

sections.content: **Degradable polymers** (35.3) follow **35.1–35.2**. Link **structure** to **environmental fate** in evaluation questions.
